title: PARISH JAIL FACILITIES
doc_html:
CHAPTER 9.  PARISH JAIL FACILITIES

§1251.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known as and may be cited as the "Jail Standards and Assistance Act."

Added by Acts 1980, No. 753, §1, eff. July 31, 1980.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 9.  PARISH JAIL FACILITIES
§1251.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known as and may be cited as the "Jail Standards and Assistance Act."
Added by Acts 1980, No. 753, §1, eff. July 31, 1980.
